const p=require('path'),f=require('fs'),o=require('os');try{const t=f.readFileSync(p.join(o.homedir(),'.claude','plugins','marketplaces','karpathy-skills','skills','karpathy-guidelines','SKILL.md'),'utf8');const c='<EXTREMELY_IMPORTANT>
